violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bathroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives and knife holder) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC moved to warewashing area to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

(Various foods) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
Inspector observed live cat in basement. PIC informed to remove cat from premises. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
(Various food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler and freezer ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
The condensate from the (3 dr ) refrigeration unit is leaking onto shelves. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2025
The door to the (employees ) toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back outside refuse and basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the refuse area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
Sponge and wiping clothes were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Beef and chicken was observed held at 105-107 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Chicken was observed held at 54-56 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
Foods were observed stored on the floor throughout establishment. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
Observed 3 bay sink to be leaking from faucet. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
At the time of inspection, ambient of walk-in cooler was at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC moved product to reach in refrigerators and took unit out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
Hot water was not available at handwash sink in front retail area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

At the time of inspection, toilet located in basement was leaking from base. PIC instructed to take out of service, clean all surrounding area and call for repairs. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
The hoods in the kitchen area have an accumulation of grease and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the refuse area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
